# Chris Guimarin

> Chris Guimarin is an Associate Director of Design for Battle.net at Blizzard Entertainment, a Broadway investor and co-founder of Currant Productions, and a board member of NextGen Advocates (Broadway Cares). He lives in New York City.

## About

Chris leads designers who elevate the player-support journey on Battle.net, build internal tools that keep live services running, and streamline workflows for game developers. His team powers experiences used by millions of players daily — from login to checkout — and the support tools behind them.

Outside of games, Chris co-founded Currant Productions and invests in Broadway shows such as Real Women Have Curves. He co-chaired Broadway Cares' NextGen Network, helping raise over $350,000 for artists in need.

## Expertise

- Design leadership and team management
- User experience design for gaming platforms
- Player support and service design
- Internal tools and developer experience
- Broadway producing and theater investment
- Nonprofit board leadership

## Work

- [Battle.net](https://chrisguimarin.com/work/battle-net/): Case study on design leadership for Blizzard's Battle.net platform

## Writing

- [Culture Is What You Tolerate](https://chrisguimarin.com/writing/culture-is-what-you-tolerate/): On how the minimum you accept shapes your life and leadership
- [Marks on Blank Pages](https://chrisguimarin.com/writing/marks-on-blank-pages/): Year-in-review reflecting on momentum, creativity, and new beginnings
